notableEvents.label: Alex Bregman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alex Bregman grounds into a double play, second baseman Marcus Semien to shortstop Francisco Lindor to first baseman Mark Vientos. Nico Hoerner out at 2nd. Alex Bregman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Matt Shaw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Matt Shaw singles on a ground ball to third baseman Bo Bichette.

notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto doubles (3) on a line drive to right fielder Tyrone Taylor. Scott Kingery scores.

notableEvents.label: Nico Hoerner walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Nico Hoerner out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Tyrone Taylor. Pete Crow-Armstrong scores.

notableEvents.label: Tyrone Taylor pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyrone Taylor called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Tyrone Taylor pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyrone Taylor flies out to left fielder Michael Conforto.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Nico Hoerner out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Tyrone Taylor. Pete Crow-Armstrong scores.
